divergences: Wallpaper (purple/blue/orange abstract macOS art) approximated with layered CSS radial/linear gradients rather than the exact photographic source; the diagonal metallic streak faintly visible through the window's backdrop-filter blur (bottom-right of detail pane) is a coarser CSS approximation than the photographic original.

Remaining RMSE is dominated by photographic wallpaper texture/JPEG compression grain outside and faintly through the vibrancy-blurred window, plus font antialiasing differences — not content or layout mismatches.
